prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `7e2bad24`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `7e2bad24`. The rule is: extend the blue diagonal from its exposed ends; red `2` bars act as mirrors that bounce the path before entry, while green `3` bars are pass-through cells that get overwritten by blue.

The summary hint was only partially usable. `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, and the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` description was corrected in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7e2bad24/notes.md#L1) because it incorrectly treated green `3` lines as reflective. No new primitive was added to `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

Key files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7e2bad24/__init__.py), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7e2bad24/helpers.py#L7), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7e2bad24/verifier.py#L6), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7e2bad24/generator.py#L126). The generator matches the family by building fixed 16x16 grids with sparse long axis-aligned red/green barriers, tracing a latent border-entering diagonal ray, and exposing only a short border-anchored blue prefix in the input.

Validation passed:
- `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 7e2bad24`: `5/5` official examples.
- `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 7e2bad24 --n-examples 1000`: built successfully.
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 7e2bad24`: `1000/1000` generated examples passed.
- I also opened [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e2bad24/previews/preview_01.png) and the samples look on-distribution.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e2bad24/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e2bad24/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e2bad24/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e2bad24/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/7e2bad24/previews/preview_03.png).
